headline: Aon’s 10% Dividend Hike Highlights Cash Returns And Valuation Gap
summary: Aon (NYSE:AON) announced a 10% increase in its quarterly cash dividend. The higher dividend was approved by the board, signaling confidence in the company’s financial position. The move reflects Aon’s focus on returning cash to shareholders through its regular dividend program. Aon operates as a global provider of risk, retirement, and health solutions, serving corporates and institutions that rely on its advisory and brokerage services. For investors tracking insurance brokers and risk...
